content:
A week is passed, when possible, I would like if the suggestions and feedbacks can be passed on, so I compiled them in this list to help, the recent and some old ones that weren't formally addressed:
- **[Tentacle Gathering on enemies feedback](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1452214379411144755)**
- **[Asking for more Poison Carry and problem with DoTs](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1459875367174144094)** (it may be useful to have a carry poison applicator that don't need to scale slowly with str or external sources, considering that poison is, in itself, slow to trigger)
- **[Possibility to Rebalance Wanda](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1459555990478524569)** (in part connected to the next suggestion)

- **[Possible Counter Scaling Changes fo AstraReign](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455882869410103458)**
- **[Make so the Sepirot Capture don't give copies of a limited that you already have at +12](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1458059497187573862)**
- **[Make so you can hear a demo of the music you need to clear Hard mode and pay the orbs to get ](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1458489416182927514)** (how can you tell us to pay the time gated orbs on a track that we don't even know?)
- **[Possibility to turn off and on some of the already acquired Enlightens](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1456306287884112096)** (already asked before, by multiple people,  but is a very nice feature to keep in mind)
- **[Give more or easier options to farm some covenant pieces, with stamina](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1456123871383130243)**
- **[Possible small Souforge buff for Aurita](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455874176534712330)**
- **[Small change to the free event ssr to make it work with Pure Chaos too ](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455674884712829139)**
- **[CN plea to control possible powerkreep levels](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455229843368317101)**
- **[Possibility to change the name of Piecing strike of Ogier to Piecing Shot or others](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455326448683454465)**
- **[Plea to make the initial page to login take less click to enter the game ](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1451860479097049199)**
- **[Same complains about the reading experience](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1451152833654296677)**

- **[Plea to make the new events a bit more varied ](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1440765286063276053) **(could add some small fight sections in between the solo boss levels, or other stuff to break the mold a bit)
- ** [Small plea to let us unlock a particular track without his jarring first section](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1444886130540548231)**
- **[ Small plea to ask if official design sheets of Character could be created or shared, to help with fan-arts](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1446806809074602066)**
- **[Small plea to ask if we could have more option to Break down or synthesize the Soulforge material ](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1444303746711687178)**

P.s i don't know if the dev team have a google doc or board that list the various feedbacks, suggestions etc, so they can reference it to see possible points to address when given the chance, but it would be useful, if not already implemented, to not loose track of all this possibilities.
